product_overview: AXIOM V2 is an AI-powered real estate platform for the Egyptian market. It lets users search and browse properties, view rich listing details, contact agents, manage favorites and listings, and gives admins tools to review and manage platform content.
core_goals: Search for properties using filters or natural language queries
Browse detailed property, agency, project, and blog content
Create and manage property listings from a user dashboard
Save favorite listings and review them later
Contact agents through WhatsApp from property detail pages
Use AI chat to discover matching listings and ask property questions
Allow admins to approve listings and manage users and content

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new user account with personal and login details.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in full name -> Fill in email -> Fill in phone number -> Select gender -> Fill in password -> Submit the signup form -> See success message or email confirmation notice
Navigate to /signup -> Enter invalid information -> Submit the signup form -> See validation errors

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password to access the authenticated dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See error message

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset email for account recovery.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email -> Submit the reset request form -> See confirmation message

features.name: Browse Listings
features.description: Search, filter, sort, and paginate property listings on the find homes page.
user_flows: Navigate to /find-homes -> Select category filter -> Select city filter -> Set price range -> Set number of bedrooms -> Apply filters -> View updated results
Navigate to /find-homes -> Change sort order -> View listings reordered
Navigate to /find-homes -> Use pagination controls -> View the next set of listings
Navigate to /find-homes -> Select a listing card -> Open the property detail page

features.name: Property Detail
features.description: View full property information, map location, and related listings on a property page.
user_flows: Navigate to /property/[id] -> View images -> Read title, price, location, description, and specs -> View the property map -> Review similar listings
Navigate to /property/[id] -> Select a similar listing card -> Open another property detail page

features.name: WhatsApp Lead Capture
features.description: Contact an agent from a property page and open the WhatsApp chat flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /property/[id] -> Click Contact via WhatsApp -> If not logged in, see redirect to /login
Navigate to /property/[id] -> Click Contact via WhatsApp -> If logged in, open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Review account information, analytics, favorites, listings, and viewings from a protected dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View profile details -> View analytics -> View own listings -> View liked properties -> View upcoming viewings
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Add Listing -> Open the listing creation modal

features.name: Add Listing
features.description: Create a new property listing from the dashboard using a form, map picker, AI-assisted content tools, and image uploads.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Add Listing -> Fill in listing title -> Select property type -> Select category -> Pick location on the mini-map -> Enter price -> Enter bedrooms, bathrooms, and size -> Select furnishing type -> Add amenities -> Enter or generate a description -> Upload images -> Submit the form -> See the new listing appear in My Listings with pending status
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Add Listing -> Add an invalid amenity -> See validation feedback before submission

features.name: AI Chat
features.description: Use the floating assistant to ask property questions and receive streamed responses with matching listings.
user_flows: Click the floating AI button -> See the chat drawer open -> Type a property question -> Submit the message -> See streamed response text appear -> See inline listing cards appear after the response
Click the floating AI button -> Continue the conversation with a follow-up message -> Receive another streamed response
Click the floating AI button -> Close the chat drawer

features.name: Natural Language Search
features.description: Search for homes using plain language and get redirected to filtered results.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a natural language property query -> Submit the search -> See redirect to /find-homes with results applied
Navigate to /find-homes -> Type a natural language property query -> Submit the search -> See updated filtered results

features.name: Property Recommendations
features.description: View personalized listing suggestions on the homepage based on saved favorites.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the recommendations section -> See personalized listing cards -> Select a card -> Open the property detail page

features.name: Favorite Listings
features.description: Save and revisit listings by toggling the favorite state on cards and viewing them in the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /find-homes -> Click the heart on a listing card -> See the favorite state toggle
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open liked properties -> View saved favorite listings

features.name: Agency Directory
features.description: Browse agency cards and open agency profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /agencies -> View agency cards -> Select an agency card -> Open the agency detail page

features.name: Agency Detail
features.description: Review an agency profile, projects, and top listings.
user_flows: Navigate to /agencies/[slug] -> View agency logo, name, description, and stats -> Browse featured projects -> View top listings from the agency
Navigate to /agencies/[slug] -> Switch project tabs -> View a different set of projects

features.name: Blog
features.description: Browse and read real estate articles and related content.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog -> Browse article cards -> Select an article -> Open the full blog post -> View related articles
Navigate to /blog/[slug] -> Read the article content -> Review related articles in the sidebar

features.name: Admin Listing Approvals
features.description: Review pending listings and approve or reject them from the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Select Listings in the entity picker -> Filter by pending status -> Approve a listing -> See the status update in the table
Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Select Listings in the entity picker -> Filter by pending status -> Reject a listing -> Enter a rejection reason -> See the status update in the table

features.name: Admin Leads View
features.description: Inspect captured WhatsApp lead records from the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Select Leads in the entity picker -> View lead records in the table -> Filter by agency, source, or date range

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Review users and grant verified seller badges from the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Select Users in the entity picker -> View the users table -> Grant a verified badge to a user

features.name: Roommate Compatibility
features.description: Check how well a user fits a shared housing listing by submitting lifestyle preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /property/[id] -> Open a shared housing listing -> View the compatibility score widget -> Submit lifestyle preferences -> See a compatibility score with reasons

routes.description: Homepage with hero, featured listings, AI search bar, testimonials, CTA
Email + password login via Supabase Auth
New user registration with email, password, full name, phone, gender
Set new password after clicking email reset link
Browse and filter property listings by category, city, price, bedrooms
Full property detail with images, specs, map, WhatsApp CTA, similar listings
Redirects to /property/[id] — same component handles shared housing
User dashboard with profile, analytics, listings, liked properties, viewings
Agency directory with developer cards and stats
Agency detail with projects, team, listings
Real estate project detail with residence cards and sales agent sidebar
Blog listing page with article cards
Full blog article with sidebar and related articles
Static about page with mission, values, team
Admin panel — approve/reject listings, manage users, agencies, blog posts

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Register a new account with email, password, full name, phone, and gender
user_interactions: See success message or email confirmation notice
See validation errors on invalid input

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Send password reset email via Supabase

features.name: Browse Listings (Find Homes)
features.description: Filter and paginate property listings by category, city, price, bedrooms
user_interactions: Select category filter (For Rent / For Sale / Shared Housing)
Click a listing card to go to property detail
Change sort order (newest, price asc/desc, most viewed)

features.name: Property Detail
features.description: View full property information including map, images, specs, and WhatsApp contact
user_interactions: Read title, price, location, description, specs
View interactive map with property pin
Click WhatsApp CTA button to contact agent
Click similar listing card to navigate

features.name: WhatsApp Lead Capture
features.description: Record a WhatsApp contact click and return the wa.me deep link
user_interactions: If not logged in, be redirected to /login
If logged in, be redirected to WhatsApp with pre-filled message

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated user's control center — view profile, listings, favorites, viewings
user_interactions: View profile card with name, avatar, bio, phone
View list of own listings with status badges (active/pending/rejected)
Click "Add Listing" button to open modal

features.name: Add Listing
features.description: Create a new property listing via modal form with map picker and AI amenity validation
user_interactions: Click Add Listing button on dashboard
Enter bedrooms, bathrooms, size in sqm
Enter or generate description (AI bilingual generator)
See new listing appear in My Listings with pending status

features.name: AI Chat (RAG Chatbot)
features.description: Floating AI assistant that answers property questions and surfaces listing cards via SSE streaming
user_interactions: Type a message (e.g. "Show me 2-bedroom apartments in Maadi")
See streaming text response token by token
See inline listing cards appear after response

features.name: Natural Language Search
features.description: AI-powered search bar that translates free text into property filters
user_interactions: Type natural language query in search bar (e.g. "quiet apartment near Zamalek under 10k")
Be redirected to /find-homes with results applied

features.name: Property Recommendations
features.description: AI-personalized listing suggestions based on user favorites shown on homepage
user_interactions: See listing cards personalized to saved favorites
Click a card to go to property detail

features.name: Favorite Listings
features.description: Toggle favorite/heart on listings; view all favorites in dashboard
user_interactions: Click heart icon on a listing card
View saved favorites under Dashboard > Liked Properties

features.name: Agency Directory
features.description: Browse all real estate agencies/developers
user_interactions: Click an agency card to view agency detail

features.name: Agency Detail
features.description: View full agency profile with projects, team members, and listings
user_interactions: View agency logo, name, description, stats

features.name: Blog
features.description: Read real estate articles and market insights
user_interactions: Click article to read full content

features.name: Admin - Listing Approvals
features.description: Admin reviews and approves or rejects pending listings
user_interactions: Click Approve button on a listing
Click Reject button and enter rejection reason
See listing status update in table

features.name: Admin - Leads View
features.description: Admin views all WhatsApp lead capture records
user_interactions: View table of lead records with contact info and listing title
Filter by agency, source, date range

features.name: Admin - User Management
features.description: Admin views and manages users, grants verified seller badge
user_interactions: Click Grant Verified Badge button on a user row

features.name: Roommate Compatibility
features.description: Score how well a user fits in a shared housing listing

known_limitations.issue: Homepage featured listings use mock data — not yet wired to Supabase
known_limitations.impact: Homepage shows static placeholder listings, not real database content

known_limitations.issue: Testimonials section uses hardcoded mock data
known_limitations.impact: Testimonials are not pulled from database

known_limitations.issue: AI features require local Ollama server at port 11434 with axiom-llm model
known_limitations.impact: All AI features return ai_unavailable if Ollama is not running

known_limitations.issue: WhatsApp CTA requires user to have a phone number on their profile
known_limitations.impact: Lead creation fails if the authenticated user has no phone number stored

known_limitations.issue: Deployment not configured — no CI/CD or production environment
known_limitations.impact: Tests must run against localhost:3000 (dev or production build)
